capabilities.name: Earned Value Management (EVM)
capabilities.description: Quantitative project performance measurement using planned value, earned value, and actual cost to calculate schedule and cost variance, CPI, and SPI.

requirements.text: Calculate planned value (PV) from the approved project baseline schedule and budget
proxy_refs: Planned value (PV / BCWS) calculation from baseline

requirements.text: Calculate schedule variance (SV) as the difference between earned value and planned value

requirements.text: Calculate cost variance (CV) as the difference between earned value and actual cost
proxy_refs: Schedule variance (SV) and cost variance (CV)

requirements.text: Calculate cost performance index (CPI) as the ratio of earned value to actual cost
proxy_refs: Cost performance index (CPI) and schedule performance index (SPI)

requirements.text: Calculate schedule performance index (SPI) as the ratio of earned value to planned value
proxy_refs: Cost performance index (CPI) and schedule performance index (SPI)

requirements.text: Calculate estimate at completion (EAC) using actual cost and performance indices
proxy_refs: Estimate at completion (EAC) and estimate to complete (ETC)
